prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: 2×1 close-up action-parts sheet for scene 4 of a layered Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample; match the elderly woman's sleeves, hands, thick iron pestle, grinding stone contact and exact handmade paper language
Primary request: two complete isolated close-up cutouts, one per horizontal cell: 1 both elderly hands in muted ochre sleeves firmly holding the thick iron pestle diagonally, with the full visible pestle and no stone; 2 a second phase of the same hands and pestle shifted slightly along the grinding direction for rhythmic motion
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, fibrous torn edges, restrained ink, matte iron gray and ochre mineral pigments
Composition/framing: exact 2 columns × 1 row, consistent hand anatomy and pestle thickness, generous padding, no overlap, complete wrists, fingers and pestle endpoints
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background in both cells, no floor, shadow, gradient, texture, stone or divider
Constraints: no finished needle, sparks, text, label, watermark, logo, extra limbs or #ff00ff in subject
Avoid: distorted fingers, warped pestle, photorealism, glossy 3D, cropped endpoints, motion blur
